instructions: Remove the offline mirror entry pointing to `https://ftpmirror.infania.net/mirror/archlinux/` to resolve the `tests/verify_mirrorlist_connectivity.sh` failure and unblock the CI build pipeline.
constraints: Do not add any new mirrors.
Do not re-rank or reorder the existing mirrors.
Do not modify `pacman.conf` or any other configuration files.
Ensure the file remains a valid pacman mirrorlist.
